text: Investing in the Korean electric scooter company PUMP.
author: Jinny
story:
PUMP, which operates the personal mobility sharing service SingSing, announced on the 26th that it will merge with Kickgoing.

After the merger, PUMP will remain as the surviving entity.

Kim Dong-hyun, CEO of PUMP, will be responsible for management, while Choi Young-woo, CEO of Kickgoing, will join as COO to oversee business operations.

Both companies are among the first-generation personal mobility firms in South Korea.

Meanwhile, Ylem Invest has acquired the shares of shareholders who exercised their appraisal rights in opposition to the merger.

text: PAIPTREE Secures USD 2M Investment from Ylem Invest.
author: Ashley
story:
Ylem Invest has invested in Korean AgTech AI company PAIPTREE, which is expanding its AI platform internationally.

The platform offers disease prevention and production management solutions for poultry farms, gaining traction in Korea with clients.

PAIPTREE's partnerships in Taiwan and plans for expansion into China, Japan, Madagascar, and Indonesia highlight its growth potential.

Ylem Invest's 2 billion KRW investment reflects confidence in PAIPTREE's future in the AgTech sector.

text: HMCIB No. 6 SPAC: HMSEC Sponsor and Ylem Invest Founder with Francis Han as Representative
author: Francis
story:
HMCIB No. 6 SPAC is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) in which HMSEC has participated as the sponsor.

The founding entity for this SPAC is Ylem Invest, which plays a crucial role in its formation and operational direction.

Furthermore, the representative of Ylem Invest, Francis Han, has been appointed to serve as the representative of HMCIB No. 6 SPAC.

This appointment underscores Francis Han's leadership role within the SPAC and highlights the strategic involvement of Ylem Invest in the venture as it seeks to identify and merge with a suitable target company in the future.

text: Establish Ylem Invest and initiate Venture capital business.
author: Francis
story:
Ylem Invest is a venture capital firm founded by Lee Dae-hee, former CEO of Cuchen; Lee Hee-seung, owner of JFT; and Francis Han, ex-Senior Manager at Mirae Asset Venture Investment.

The firm focuses on identifying promising startups while providing financial support, mentorship, and networking opportunities.

Committed to sustainability, Ylem Invest incorporates ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) criteria to ensure positive social impact and attractive returns for investors.

Ultimately, Ylem Invest aims to foster innovation and growth for its portfolio companies and stakeholders.
